title: Good Operational Security Opsec Practices Do Not Include
source_filename: Good Operational Security Opsec Practices Do Not Include.docx

qas.q: The Tier 3 Investigation is designated for the following positions:
Which of the following methods may be used to transmit Top Secret material?
qas.a:
- Appropriately cleared courier
- Protected facsimile, message or voice

qas.q: Which of the following is responsible for the review of written materials for public release?
qas.a: Defense Office of Republication and Security Review

qas.q: Good Operations Security (OPSEC) practices DO NOT include:
qas.a: Discussing sensitive information carefully in public

qas.q: Examples of Controlled Unclassified Information (CUI) include:
qas.a:
- Inspection reports
- Investigation documents

Answer was wrong!

qas.q: The Physical Security Program is designed to:
qas.a: Protect against espionage, sabotage, damage, and theft

qas.q: All of the following are examples of Adverse Information that must be reported EXCEPT:
qas.a: Traffic violations with a fine under $300

qas.q: You must obtain a defensive foreign travel security briefing prior to travel or at least once a year from whom?
What form is used to record the opening and closing of the security container?
In addition to foreign travel requirements, those with SCI access must:
qas.a:
- Complete a foreign travel questionnaire prior to proceeding on travel
- Complete a secondary questionnaire upon return
